compiled_state.title: Implement resource_exhaustion as non-blocking in pre-commit-test-gate.sh
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add resource_exhaustion as a non-blocking status at both test-gate checkpoints in pre-commit-test-gate.sh. Follow the existing inline conditional pattern (|| checks alongside timeout/partial).

## Implementation

1. Fast-path (~line 471): Change the condition from exact match '== "passed"' to also accept resource_exhaustion: '== "passed" || == "resource_exhaustion"'. This allows the fast-path hash-match optimization to trigger for resource_exhaustion status.

2. Full-path (~line 594/597): Add '|| == "resource_exhaustion"' to the existing timeout/partial fail-open conditional. This treats resource_exhaustion as non-blocking (emits warning, falls through to diff hash check instead of blocking with exit 1).

3. Add a warning message when resource_exhaustion is detected: echo a note to stderr indicating the test status was resource_exhaustion (non-blocking).

No changes needed to validate.sh — it does not read test-gate-status.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All RED tests from Task 1 now PASS (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate-resource-exhaustion.sh
- [ ] Fast-path accepts resource_exhaustion
  Verify: grep -q 'resource_exhaustion' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh
- [ ] Full-path accepts resource_exhaustion
  Verify: grep -c 'resource_exhaustion' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] Existing gate tests still pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] No syntax errors
  Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (files read: pre-commit-test-gate.sh) ✓

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Tests GREEN (4/4 new + 34/34 existing) ✓. resource_exhaustion non-blocking at both fast-path and full-path checkpoints. Warning emitted on stderr.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓. All AC verified: 4/4 new tests GREEN, 34/34 existing tests GREEN, 6 occurrences of resource_exhaustion in gate file, no syntax errors.
